description: Public website branding for the unregistered-visitor site (ADR 061): logo, favicon, colour scheme and fonts. These feed CSS custom properties (--brand-*) injected into the website head and the custom navbar/footer. Portal/desk logos live on Seminary Settings, not here.

fields.description: Logo shown in the public website navbar. Recommended height ~40px, transparent PNG/SVG.
fields.label: Website Logo

fields.description: Browser tab icon for public pages (square, e.g. 64x64 PNG or .ico).
fields.label: Favicon

fields.description: Brand colours follow brand-manual convention. Primary drives the navbar, primary buttons and links; tertiary/accent are used for call-to-action highlights.
fields.label: Colour Scheme

fields.description: Default body text colour. Pair with Background for adequate contrast.
fields.label: Text

fields.description: Fonts are self-hosted (no external Google Fonts call at page load).
fields.label: Typography

fields.description: Used for headings and the brand wordmark.
fields.label: Heading Font

fields.description: Social media accounts to link from the public website footer. Shown as icons in the order listed.
fields.label: Social Links

fields.description: Hero banner shown at the top of the public Home page.
fields.label: Home Page Hero

fields.description: Main hero headline. Leave blank to fall back to the site name.
fields.label: Hero Headline

fields.description: Large background/hero image for the Home page.
fields.label: Hero Image

fields.description: Text for the hero call-to-action button. Leave the link blank to hide the button.
fields.label: Hero Button Label

fields.description: Where the hero button links (e.g. /program, or a direct application URL). Leave blank to hide the button.
fields.label: Hero Button Link

fields.description: Optional. Overrides the auto singular/plural label for the programs catalogue ("Our Program" vs "Our Programs"). Leave blank to let the site pick based on how many programs are published.
fields.label: Programs Menu Label Override

fields.description: Show each team member's salutation (Dr, Prof, Rev, ...) before their name on the public "Our Team" roster.
fields.label: Show Salutations on Team Roster

name: Website Branding
